description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this navy blue laptop bag from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accommodate everything you need, while you strut around looking super funky!Height: 42 cmWidth: 28 cmDepth: 11 cmMade of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne large zippered main compartment that opens from the side with a separate chamber for laptop, with velcro fasteners to make sure it stays putOne zippered pocket on the front at the top to stow essentialsTwo side pockets with mesh outerBrand name printed on above mentioned pocketBrand tab appliqued on the frontPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh on the back and straps for better ventilation and breathabilityErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyHaul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
